Peter, this is important. After last night's update, I'm winning by only 3,550 votes.
[](http://links.makingagreateramerica.com/u/click?_t=61da4500de824401a8b93478db1cc37b&_m=9659efe055be42adac4bb5e54bd331d3&_e=gLVLQlptyeWJ1pG0YTFKzFhunXpU9STgnsj-DlreG124asYcQ63V7u3TCPVx5nzuAidQNneNFH_dZ-BP5DbZejetFGLPNa07zdtcaFOgxjFsO_FGRyo7E1J9s35nKIjfrsiHg2WQadMb1t_uGvGkiMtFAr1x2HStEBjD6p4GtnFmkbVxRHZq5RaYHdK2l2qSXylqHAeKs_78r-_3nJ5ZoyWtyM6YQEhFjKpMogwm4O2u1KRU3M_UWOrJ1iaa8Ii_edjHNF_W4DsuqJcBysNELGgctb6iWg6uc99I5JhO9NZLQNKcXF5VnFrsL4TNU2QPWDaUFQ16MaRnYjhkxkAF08A3Qz3MrWZZBBNiPKdS3FE09EvMy_vAwP6aUe9IGsXZpEb6G5XojT6ueBHd9fMdL4NXn4wc_RQ8UfKAmTbrg2iLUWArg31Rj40zjZcYiqEZ-5RwUmlf4QXAlC2dXu0IHdak_wpwO3gpzVU_t1WqU3KB_NrDIG5S_fd_Gt3etPuJHy_nDk6-pJ4HQKAk60XDNg%3D%3D)
This margin is razor-thin and Pelosi has lined up an army of lawyers to challenge the results in court. We can't let the Democrats use their never-ending war chests to drag this battle out in court.

And here's the bad news: getting to November 3rd took everything we had. We emptied our pockets to run the television ads people saw before heading to the polls and we zeroed our accounts to expand our GOTV efforts.

That's why I have to ask:[ ](http://links.makingagreateramerica.com/u/click?_t=61da4500de824401a8b93478db1cc37b&_m=9659efe055be42adac4bb5e54bd331d3&_e=gLVLQlptyeWJ1pG0YTFKzFhunXpU9STgnsj-DlreG124asYcQ63V7u3TCPVx5nzuAidQNneNFH_dZ-BP5DbZejetFGLPNa07zdtcaFOgxjFsO_FGRyo7E1J9s35nKIjfrsiHg2WQadMb1t_uGvGkiMtFAr1x2HStEBjD6p4GtnFmkbVxRHZq5RaYHdK2l2qSXylqHAeKs_78r-_3nJ5ZoyWtyM6YQEhFjKpMogwm4O2u1KRU3M_UWOrJ1iaa8Ii_edjHNF_W4DsuqJcBysNELGgctb6iWg6uc99I5JhO9NZLQNKcXF5VnFrsL4TNU2QPIob1xScppaq2-5EI7-9djbGuFzcLqWwixmoW5GnDyb9e5FombmOJIum9NbIJErflcLYyr3gNv5H_EdsaU8FL5BfiDDqbMSxURcvmKxZX48GFfUkdhCxpmaW6Uab0uDuoBmemX-gAvBx2MvpWrWdYFLSRwWGS8KyhwuetCmsaJzeUkTvVXJg-t9DpnanbLIt6zlOIIvcGRSc3xQSeLnt62g%3D%3D)**[Can you chip in to our Recount Fund to help us fight?](http://links.makingagreateramerica.com/u/click?_t=61da4500de824401a8b93478db1cc37b&_m=9659efe055be42adac4bb5e54bd331d3&_e=gLVLQlptyeWJ1pG0YTFKzFhunXpU9STgnsj-DlreG124asYcQ63V7u3TCPVx5nzuAidQNneNFH_dZ-BP5DbZejetFGLPNa07zdtcaFOgxjFsO_FGRyo7E1J9s35nKIjfrsiHg2WQadMb1t_uGvGkiMtFAr1x2HStEBjD6p4GtnFmkbVxRHZq5RaYHdK2l2qSXylqHAeKs_78r-_3nJ5ZoyWtyM6YQEhFjKpMogwm4O2u1KRU3M_UWOrJ1iaa8Ii_edjHNF_W4DsuqJcBysNELGgctb6iWg6uc99I5JhO9NZLQNKcXF5VnFrsL4TNU2QPdJfBUJCdnVMY2qPaBnO0lI_VfK6JIhOrEUqYRBi84dcBhgDiwkiiELQcW0VUyGoWhM91Fx-_jX7UIvpXbUIQCmKJCS5H6_Vc2jCzdLqLWkZzqtUGLVABYv4hreJqoeJkD8O1JM6r6yGdA3z7AvbhNPX6U5j_gi59cTFFfKQaeZMUfbeUSV1-rUXlhoJfNtJtcPF6DETUHfgECV18-48oKQ%3D%3D) We are poised to win, but we can't quit now.**

We are officially 1 week past Election Day, and this race is still too close to call. We knew it would be close and we knew it would be tough, but it's shaping up to be one of the tightest in the nation.

clean_body: ** This margin is razor-thin and Pelosi has lined up an army of lawyers to challenge the results in court. We can't let the Democrats use their never-ending war chests to drag this battle out in court. Peter, this is important. After last night's update, I'm winning by only 3,550 votes. This margin is razor-thin and Pelosi has lined up an army of lawyers to challenge the results in court. We can't let the Democrats use their never-ending war chests to drag this battle out in court. And here's the bad news: getting to November 3rd took everything we had. We emptied our pockets to run the television ads people saw before heading to the polls and we zeroed our accounts to expand our GOTV efforts. That's why I have to ask: We are poised to win, but we can't quit now. We are officially 1 week past Election Day, and this race is still too close to call. We knew it would be close and we knew it would be tough, but it's shaping up to be one of the tightest in the nation. | I know we can win, but it's critical we have to keep fighting. | Dear Friends,

You won’t believe this — halfway through today’s recount debacle, the Democrats and Jeanne Dietsch conceded the state Senate race making it official - **Denise Ricciardi will be our next Senator from District 9!** Dietsch’s income tax is dead and she did not even show up at her own recount.

We knew that a recount was unnecessary. The recount endangered workers and volunteers’ health but the Democrats ignored the Covid 19 science and wanted to play political games. And that’s unfortunate because we have important work to do - like help our working families and small businesses get back on their feet.

What’s even more ridiculous, we have to go through these political machinations _again_ tomorrow. SD 12 voters elected Kevin Avard as their next state Senator with an even greater vote margin than in the other two Senate recounts COMBINED, but the Democrats just won’t accept the truth.

That’s why we need your help . Can you help us one more time by contributing to our Recount Defense Fund? name: Tim Scott
subject: Our work is not done
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
body:
****
I know you are hearing conflicting information about the results of the Presidential election, but the Senate Majority is still undecided. Democrats are already flooding Georgia with millions of dollars and negative television ads to beat my Republican colleagues and FLIP the Senate BLUE.
Peter,

I know you are hearing conflicting information about the results of the Presidential election, but the Senate Majority is still undecided.

Here is one thing we know for certain: **two Senate runoff elections in Georgia will decide who controls the Senate Majority.**

_That 's right, our work is not done._

Democrats are already flooding Georgia with millions of dollars and negative television ads to beat my Republican colleagues and FLIP the Senate BLUE.

[**I am looking to activate 500 grassroots conservatives to stand with me and help us hold the Republican Senate Majority. Are you in, Peter?**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=9d52134fb41e468583c0c95ff055f3ed&_e=n2EhjYP0zu4_XouKW1PisJPUVWQ3_BYJ82wh_OzpV1cI3HkoOuYF53l0vSMc6BlZL84pvav08AuO_muuH09br47f8aW05v0z-P3P_Ui2lrLOHSwjYG3-07exXfuBGu5QIKJuPHUShAFKTsSAT7bxKE1I3ATc-v_1o6ey0kOSrp9KxWUe5RMy2Sa0FHVXb5rlyjm7C-d9Lsl9ZcTzkA6CusL6BbgzD5d4a-gLCt-3WrLU9Zbp0ZwjX4CgtvhdnMXgKkSJWe5fl_j4Z_8pPySl_gFMlljnldqeHS0SGZCaPZY-PYh5s3wI9wvC5DzqNAk6pWX7u1MiwBu6WV7bOb6P322y1qV3J83IB4s3ts2plaIqtBzg2UL86kOduzyE5DBl0aFLH1LI5yMECadxVgI5zsOssXpzfIG0VwO81k61iXU10u1Q-2ETZKM-vVA4nqIjvrPyhBMgVM4OEt9sG6S0rRf8KHz1-TqKK8KoSRZMV2S57i6UEXPFErbATOOVSBac36tHmhhceAOsfCX_RUI2Ig%3D%3D)

The mainstream media and Democrats were planning for a total blowout on election night--and we proved them wrong.

They expected to beat Republicans up and down the ballot and thanks to millions of grassroots supporters like you, we fought back and won.

Peter, but we need to finish the job. We need to win BOTH Senate runoff elections in Georgia to prevent Chuck Schumer from taking over the Senate.

[**I set an ambitious goal of activating 500 grassroots conservatives to stand with me and help us hold the Republican Senate Majority.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=9d52134fb41e468583c0c95ff055f3ed&_e=n2EhjYP0zu4_XouKW1PisJPUVWQ3_BYJ82wh_OzpV1cI3HkoOuYF53l0vSMc6BlZL84pvav08AuO_muuH09br47f8aW05v0z-P3P_Ui2lrLOHSwjYG3-07exXfuBGu5QIKJuPHUShAFKTsSAT7bxKE1I3ATc-v_1o6ey0kOSrp9KxWUe5RMy2Sa0FHVXb5rlyjm7C-d9Lsl9ZcTzkA6CusL6BbgzD5d4a-gLCt-3WrLU9Zbp0ZwjX4CgtvhdnMXgKkSJWe5fl_j4Z_8pPySl_gFMlljnldqeHS0SGZCaPZY-PYh5s3wI9wvC5DzqNAk6zSGFPzMlmp_XdT5E2VlE10ipiuitXhqU_Ci8S7NYQ1sN6TKP--fl0k6PGHe6wYvJ4vJlEcnzg7l0aFXimayp5MEXhgLjIMKOuoYs-5DbdNinqGOGLakxhUtfYcoGJbg11PGLOOxXwWRki5sFfjv_OV3q1d_yYaaHc5QsVLtBP18Y3o74NwrdyRxeOncmAPlA0uJAryERb2WA4kSUhrKLcw%3D%3D)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Muthoni=20Wambu=20Kraal?=
subject: DNC Updates: Counting Every Vote; Biden-Harris Transition; Georgia Senate Runoff
body:
| | | |
---
| | | **Dear Friends-

Yesterday President-elect Biden [announced](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=d54a3384e8&e=d6c5c7d7ec) his coronavirus [task force](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=e17450cabe&e=d6c5c7d7ec). He did so as a record[ 133,000](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=b6083bc58f&e=d6c5c7d7ec) new infections were reported, and for the sixth day in a row more than 100,000 cases were reported. Americans have now suffered 10 million infections and nearly 240,000 deaths. Infections are rising in[ 43 states](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=78e2c31474&e=d6c5c7d7ec), and 19 states reported record-high hospitalizations this weekend. ** ** ** **Which is why these continued delays around the transition process by the Trump Administration are so costly to American lives. As if we haven’t lost enough.** ** ** **Juxtapose that to four years ago today, when President Obama and Vice President Biden met with Trump and Pence to ensure a peaceful transition of power. ** ** ** **[Michael Beschloss](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=32c5d993d4&e=d6c5c7d7ec) : “Four years ago today, President Obama welcomed his successor to the Oval Office” ** ** ** ** ** ** ** **[CNN’s Jim Sciutto](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=a7369c1514&e=d6c5c7d7ec): “Four years ago today then-VP Biden met with VP-Elect Pence to ensure a ‘seamless transfer of power’.”** ** ** ** ** ** **** ** **Meanwhile:**
* **Trump’s administrator at the General Services Administration (GSA) is refusing to authorize President-elect Biden’s transition.**

**[NBC News](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=19bbf730f6&e=d6c5c7d7ec): “The head of the General Services Administration has yet to recognize the incoming Biden administration — a delay that could have consequences for the president-elect's plan to move swiftly on the coronavirus.”** ** **
* **T rump’s GSA administrator has a long history of making controversial decisions to defend Trump, including on the lease of his D.C. hotel.**

** **
* **This could undermine Vice President Biden’s ability to combat the coronavirus as it surges to new records across the country.**

**[NBC News’s Monica Alba](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=88b5e17993&e=d6c5c7d7ec): “The U.S. reported 133,819 COVID cases Monday, setting a record high for daily infections, per @NBCNews. It’s the first time cases have crossed 130K in one day & the 6th day in a row the U.S. has seen more than 100K in a day. It’s the 9th daily record set nationwide since 10/22.”**
**Despite the frivolous tactics by the Trump Administration, we remain focused on moving forward. And while the delay prevents the Vice President's transition team from meeting with the White House coronavirus task force and government health experts, we have a leadership team that’s persisting. Because with over 76 million votes, President-elect Biden has won more votes than any presidential candidate in history and he is building an operation that will be ready to deliver for the American people.**
**Please see below some updates on:**
* **Counting Every Vote and Defeating Trump**
* **The Biden Coalition Record Turnout**
* **Transition**
* **Georgia Senate Run-Off Help**

** ** **Yours In the Fight,** **Muthoni**
**Counting Every Vote and Defeating Trump** **In an[interview](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=c53c510726&e=d6c5c7d7ec) with NPR this morning, DNC Chair Tom Perez discussed this historic election and defeating Trumpism. “our goals are to defeat Trump and to defeat Trumpism. Defeating Trump required 270 electoral votes or more, and we succeeded in that. Defeating Trumpism is a longer-term challenge because Trumpism predates Trump. And I can think of no better person to lead that challenge than the president-elect. He is a uniter.”**
## **Trump’s Legal ‘Strategy’ Is a Total Fraud**
**The Republican noise and the actions of their top Administration officials to delegitimize the election results is designed to shake American faith in voting. We need you to remain consistent counter messengers and remind our communities of the facts:**
* **This was not a close election: President-elect Biden won by nearly 5 million votes and counting, and is on track to win 306 electoral votes.**
* **Trump vowed to file baseless claims even before the election happened.**
* **Trump lost in 2020 by a bigger margin in swing states than he won in 2016.**

* **The Trump campaign’s legal strategy is[ failing](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=ea2867fa4b&e=d6c5c7d7ec) because there is no evidence to back up their baseless claims**
* **Trump’s lawsuits have been[ rejected](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=2d3fb32c44&e=d6c5c7d7ec) in Arizona, Georgia, Michigan, and Nevada.**
* **[Legal experts agree](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=fdf8505a05&e=d6c5c7d7ec) Trump’s latest suit in Pennsylvania has little chance of succeeding and offers little evidence to back its claims.**

* **Trump’s lawsuits aren’t serious — they are an attempt to distract and delay the inevitable.**
* **Because they can’t win in court, Trump’s allies have resorted to desperate press conferences where they[ refuse to identify themselves](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=118a168a34&e=d6c5c7d7ec) and feature a[ convicted sex offender](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=0d557a35de&e=d6c5c7d7ec) outside a landscaping business.**
* **Even Fox News[ won’t cover](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=970a2b18d2&e=d6c5c7d7ec) the campaign’s lies, while law firms[ worry](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=8a590b9135&e=d6c5c7d7ec) about representing Trump’s campaign.**
* **Trump’s lawsuits are just another of his scams — they’re being used to raise money to[ pay off campaign debts](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=f8d4fece49&e=d6c5c7d7ec) and[ launch a PAC](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=4d391552a5&e=d6c5c7d7ec).**

## **The Biden Coalition Creates Record Turnout**
* **With over[ 76 million votes](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=6f9d086e70&e=d6c5c7d7ec), President-elect Biden has won more votes than any presidential candidate in history.**
* **Biden beat Trump by nearly 5 million votes and counting, and is on track to win 306 electoral votes.**
* **Biden’s margin over Trump is bigger than the population of 26 states.**

* **Biden rebuilt the “blue wall” and won Wisconsin, Michigan, and Pennsylvania.**
* **Biden won Michigan by 147,000 votes, more than 10x Trump’s margin in 2016.**
* **Biden received 225,000 more votes in Wisconsin than Trump in 2016.**
* **Biden won the Philadelphia suburbs by 50% more than Democrats in 2016.**
** **
* **Biden is going to flip Arizona and Georgia for the first time in decades.**
* **Latinos in Arizona reported the highest vote share for Biden of any state. The Latino vote in Arizona was over 75% for Biden.**

* **Biden successfully built the Biden coalition — African American and Latino voters, suburban women, and independents.**
* **Biden won 91% of the vote in majority-African American precincts in Milwaukee and Racine, WI, and Minneapolis, MN.**
* **In Wayne County (Detroit), Biden overperformed 2016.**
* **We saw record turnout among Latino voters across the country. Latino voters helped Democrats flip Senate seats in Arizona and Colorado.**

**Biden-Harris Transition** **The transition is responsible for ensuring that the transfer of power between the current administration and the Biden-Harris administration is successful. Led by President-elect Joe Biden and Vice President-elect Kamala Harris, co-chairs, a diverse advisory board, and respected leaders and staff from across sectors, the transition team is preparing to help President-elect Biden and Vice President-elect Harris meet the urgent challenges facing our nation on Day One.** ** ** **As publicly announced [today](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=4897418248&e=d6c5c7d7ec) the Biden-Harris transition team posted the names of roughly 500 people who will work with the different government agencies.** ** ** **Go [here](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=fb0f4e461e&e=d6c5c7d7ec) to see more information or to sign up for Biden-Harris Transition updates.** ** ** **Georgia Senate Run-Off Help** **Taking Back the Senate: Ways to invest in Georgia Senate Race (Please share widely with all of your networks)**
* **Calling All Virtual Volunteers to Help Flip Georgia -[ Virtual Volunteers](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=ff2c8ead2e&e=d6c5c7d7ec)**
* **Come to Georgia to Help Flip the Senate -[ On The Ground Volunteers](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=276d09b386&e=d6c5c7d7ec)**
* **Donate to Raphael Warnock Senate Campaign: ****[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wfg_ff_lgw](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=6df85cb1e3&e=d6c5c7d7ec) **
* **Donate to the Jon Ossoff Senate Campaign:** **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tjorunoffabrams](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=b7c0136491&e=d6c5c7d7ec) **

subject: ANNOUNCEMENT: Runoff in Georgia

body:
****

subject: Two late breaking releases from the DNC War Room...
body:
| | | |
---
| | |
###

**FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE** **November 10, 2020** ****ICYMI**** **A new report confirms this election was fair, free, and secure. Trump and his Republican sycophants have no evidence for their claims — even other Republicans admit they are inventing conspiracy theories. Trump can’t hide from the truth: Joe Biden won the election and will be the 46th president of the United States.**
**New York Times: The Times Called Officials in Every State: No Evidence of Voter Fraud** **By Nick Corasaniti, Reid J. Epstein and Jim Rutenberg** **Election officials in dozens of states representing both political parties said that there was no evidence that fraud or other irregularities played a role in the outcome of the presidential race, amounting to a forceful rebuke of President Trump’s portrait of a fraudulent election.** **Over the last several days, the president, members of his administration, congressional Republicans and right wing allies have put forth the false claim that the election was stolen from President Trump and have refused to accept results that showed Joseph R. Biden Jr. as the winner.** **But top election officials across the country said in interviews and statements that the process had been a remarkable success despite record turnout and the complications of a dangerous pandemic.** **“There’s a great human capacity for inventing things that aren’t true about elections,” said Frank LaRose, a Republican who serves as Ohio’s secretary of state. “The conspiracy theories and rumors and all those things run rampant. For some reason, elections breed that type of mythology.”** **Steve Simon, a Democrat who is Minnesota’s secretary of state, said: “I don’t know of a single case where someone argued that a vote counted when it shouldn’t have or didn’t count when it should. There was no fraud.”** **“Kansas did not experience any widespread, systematic issues with voter fraud, intimidation, irregularities or voting problems,” a spokeswoman for Scott Schwab, the Republican secretary of state in Kansas, said in an email Tuesday. “We are very pleased with how the election has gone up to this point.”** **The New York Times contacted the offices of the top election officials in every state on Monday and Tuesday to ask whether they suspected or had evidence of illegal voting. Officials in 45 states responded directly to The Times. For four of the remaining states, The Times spoke to other statewide officials or found public comments from secretaries of state; none reported any major voting issues.** **[...]** **One of the Secretaries of State who did not respond to requests for comment about the election in his state was Corey Stapleton of Montana, an outgoing Republican. But Mr. Stapleton did post a message implicitly addressing the president’s ongoing fraud claims. “I have supported you, Mr. President,” he wrote. “But that time is now over! Tip your hat, bite your lip, and congratulate @JoeBiden.”** **([MORE](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=865d3d2cad&e=d6c5c7d7ec))** **###**
---
|
---
| **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE** **November 10, 2020** **NEW POLL: Vast Majority Of Americans Recognize Biden Won The Election** **More than half of America’s votes were for Vice President Biden and now nearly 80 percent recognize him as the duly elected president, despite Trump’s refusal to concede and baseless claims of widespread voter fraud.** **An overwhelming majority of Americans, including half of Republicans, recognize President-Elect Biden as the winner of the election.** **[Reuters](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=4169cedac1&e=d6c5c7d7ec): “Nearly 80% of Americans, including more than half of Republicans, recognize President-elect Joe Biden as the winner of the Nov. 3 election after most media organizations called the race for the Democrat based on his leads in critical battleground states, according to a Reuters/Ipsos poll.”** **A vast majority of Americans trust their local election officials, not Trump’s lies, and think that the loser — Trump — must concede defeat.** **[Reuters](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=ff2a37915f&e=d6c5c7d7ec): “It showed that 70% of Americans, including 83% of Democrats and 59% of Republicans, trust their local election officials to ‘do their job honestly.’”** **[Reuters](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=e69cfe3bd6&e=d6c5c7d7ec): “The poll also found that 72% think the loser of the election must concede defeat, and 60% think there will be a peaceful transition of power when Trump’s term ends in January.”** **###**
---

name: Team Hagerty
subject: The Fight Isn't Over Yet
body:
#TeamHagerty Updates Straight To Your Inbox
No images? [Click here](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-e-xikldjt-fuutjhhtj-v/) November 10, 2020 **Thank You, Team Hagerty!** [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xikldjt-fuutjhhtj-r/) Last week, the people of Tennessee chose Tennessee values, conservative values, over socialism. Team Hagerty began the journey to send Bill Hagerty to the United States Senate to represent Tennesseans and fight for our conservative values over a year ago. Since then, we have grown our momentum to a statewide grassroots movement. We are so proud of all the work that has been done, from knocking doors to making calls, each and every member of Team Hagerty has played a part in getting us where we are today. Thank you! **There's Still Work To Be Done** [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xikldjt-fuutjhhtj-y/) In order to preserve our conservative Tennessee values, we must protect the Republican Senate Majority. Right now, conservatives in Georgia need the good people of Tennessee to stand up and support conservatives in our fight to maintain the Majority. There are several ways that you can help.**[Donate To Protect The Majority!](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xikldjt-fuutjhhtj-j/)**[**Volunteer To Protect The Majority!**](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xikldjt-fuutjhhtj-t/)**[Follow Senator Kelly Loeffler!](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xikldjt-fuutjhhtj-i/)****[Follow Senator David Perdue!](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xikldjt-fuutjhhtj-d/)** **Support President Trump** [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xikldjt-fuutjhhtj-h/) President Donald Trump and his team are working to ensure a fair and transparent election for the American people. It is important that every legal vote is counted, while any illegally submitted votes are not. We must protect the sanctity of the ballot box and support President Trump. You can contribute to the president's legal defense fund **[HERE.](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xikldjt-fuutjhhtj-k/)**
## **Press Highlights**
**[Tennessean:](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xikldjt-fuutjhhtj-u/) Republican Bill Hagerty is next Tennessee U.S. Senator, defeating Democrat Marquita Bradshaw****[Fox 17:](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xikldjt-fuutjhhtj-o/) Republican Bill Hagerty wins election to U.S. Senate from Tennessee****[Breitbart:](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xikldjt-fuutjhhtj-b/) GOP's Bill Hagerty Wins U.S. Senate Race in Tennessee****[AP:](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xikldjt-fuutjhhtj-m/) Republican Hagerty wins open Tennessee Senate seat** | [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xikldjt-fuutjhhtj-c/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xikldjt-fuutjhhtj-q/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xikldjt-fuutjhhtj-a/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xikldjt-fuutjhhtj-f/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xikldjt-fuutjhhtj-z/)
---|---|---|---|---
Team Hagerty
P.O. Box 150748
Nashville, TN 37215

| | | |
---
Friends,
Happy Veterans Day! We appreciate your service and sacrifices to protect our freedom!
Congratulations to President-Elect Joe Biden and Vice President-Elect Kamala Harris on the 2020 Election! We had record breaking turnout, and we are grateful for all of those who were civically engaged and who worked tirelessly to make this election cycle possible!

---
| | | |
---
---
CHECK OUT THE NEXT EPISODE OF THE EDWARDS EMPOWERMENT TALKS PODCAST!
---
In response to the need to inspire and empower people during these challenging times, I recently launched my podcast, The Edwards Empowerment Talks! Through this platform, I invite inspiring guests to tell their personal stories of perseverance and defying the odds to encourage my listeners and viewers to stay focused and dig deep in order to do the same in their own lives. I also invite guests whose community work will equip listeners and viewers with the tools to impact change in their own community, as well. Please make sure to SUBSCRIBE TODAY by clicking [here](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Re250c6XmDsmpt4xY3bdwQxq-HkZznzgaCjEq5hHNFsKFQcMKTYSLrKlDbG8odcngllyPzWKqmE0PV4YoXlrWofTirMzpTp254x3s6XNc865mm1tpHFWl4U41tSkKPejW2VUuYMAk4oI1lyk6G0ht6XhoHsVizqu&c=B4_FBDEMhVER-2YGOv-KT2ELw9gBRmFraSGWcEWaXUU2YuaUhCBcSg==&ch=A3atqtG02-RyCTtla23pUFSheDZ3R53EJffqqNWHGjraWCEhzFFrmA==).
---
| | Trust me - You don't want to miss these inspirational and empowering conversations!
Our Recent Episodes Include:
Beto O'Rourke, Former U.S. Presidential Candidate & Congressman; Founder of Powered By People:
---
| | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Re250c6XmDsmpt4xY3bdwQxq-HkZznzgaCjEq5hHNFsKFQcMKTYSLo3EaQRvHqSo0G8Kaw9GP8FI-mXp8nK5igA51WxiLxZ1-ZsjrfWi7DsphO43HB1nZ4bliJFbNHSS4yaG6cF704xsD69-7uUUv2_tMF8GvhW7PMK94Mtm-U53BfBckX2ZNg==&c=B4_FBDEMhVER-2YGOv-KT2ELw9gBRmFraSGWcEWaXUU2YuaUhCBcSg==&ch=A3atqtG02-RyCTtla23pUFSheDZ3R53EJffqqNWHGjraWCEhzFFrmA==)
---
In Episode 05 of The Edwards Empowerment Talks podcast, Amanda Edwards has an honest conversation with Beto O'Rourke, former Candidate for U.S. President, former U.S. Congressman & Founder of Powered By People. His legendary 2018 run for U.S. Senate in Texas catapulted Beto onto the national stage. After coming close to winning his U.S. Senate bid, Beto set his sights on the White House, but concluded his bid for the Presidency earlier than he would have liked. Determined to have an impact on people and the community, Beto founded Powered By People, a grassroots PAC that supports Texas candidates with volunteer support and fundraising. Through his uniquely public journey, Beto is fueled by empowering others. Beto's desire to empower others and to contribute to the community we deserve has not come without obstacles. If you have ever had the desire to serve and faced losses and setbacks, this is one Episode you do not want to miss! You will get a little therapy, truth and motivation wrapped up in one in this Episode!
---
| | [Click Here to Watch](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Re250c6XmDsmpt4xY3bdwQxq-HkZznzgaCjEq5hHNFsKFQcMKTYSLrKlDbG8odcnm5qPZTFPK4Bh-fAxo705x82K4D2wgMcnO7dbeaIXhLWww6vvTul0YmCEis_NNv6acUTSoCWFW0upKYrZRAZ6oqZ_EwmoxeSiGsENpSioaFBZOukVvtWn1CkMTQOVnqX7&c=B4_FBDEMhVER-2YGOv-KT2ELw9gBRmFraSGWcEWaXUU2YuaUhCBcSg==&ch=A3atqtG02-RyCTtla23pUFSheDZ3R53EJffqqNWHGjraWCEhzFFrmA==)

Dr. Roger Mitchell, Chief Medical Examiner of Washington, D.C. & Deputy Mayor of Washington, D.C.:
---
[ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Re250c6XmDsmpt4xY3bdwQxq-HkZznzgaCjEq5hHNFsKFQcMKTYSLo3EaQRvHqSoMdyoUKynB4kRgl-VK0Pla-jtmcAC4eisSJwpf7nG3Io_jx2PBC-aWXTNWekFKNHqpWYYt6E95PeaU79TOaWrO6wZxU-RSC9aRiymT2hWXdffDRMt82QyxBDWP3vfghOS&c=B4_FBDEMhVER-2YGOv-KT2ELw9gBRmFraSGWcEWaXUU2YuaUhCBcSg==&ch=A3atqtG02-RyCTtla23pUFSheDZ3R53EJffqqNWHGjraWCEhzFFrmA==)

| | In Episode 04 of The Edwards Empowerment Talks podcast, Amanda Edwards has a transparent and inspiring conversation with Dr. Roger Mitchell, the Washington, D.C. Chief Medical Examiner & Washington, D.C. Deputy Mayor of Public Safety & Justice. His journey to becoming the Chief Medical Examiner & Deputy Mayor of Washington, D.C. while balancing marriage and fatherhood was not an easy one. His father suffered from addiction during his upbringing, and his father's absence created a strong void in his life. However, through the power of faith, hard work, forgiveness and bold vision he was able to forge a path toward realizing his dreams. You will get therapy, church, school, comedy and encouragement wrapped up in one in this Episode!
---
| | Exciting Upcoming Episodes Include:
* Bakari Sellers, Political Commentator, Author & Public Servant
* Lex Frieden, author of the Americans with Disabilities Act
* Lauren Anderson, first Black Principal Ballerina for Houston Ballet; One of the first Black Women to serve as a Principal Ballet Dancer in the United States
* Hon. Curtis Graves, Civil Rights Leader & Former Texas State House Representative

clean_body: An important update from us. | | | | | | | | | | November 2020 Newsletter | | | | | | Friends, Happy Veterans Day! We appreciate your service and sacrifices to protect our freedom! Congratulations to President-Elect Joe Biden and Vice President-Elect Kamala Harris on the 2020 Election! We had record breaking turnout, and we are grateful for all of those who were civically engaged and who worked tirelessly to make this election cycle possible! | | | | CHECK OUT THE NEXT EPISODE OF THE EDWARDS EMPOWERMENT TALKS PODCAST! In response to the need to inspire and empower people during these challenging times, I recently launched my podcast, The Edwards Empowerment Talks! Through this platform, I invite inspiring guests to tell their personal stories of perseverance and defying the odds to encourage my listeners and viewers to stay focused and dig deep in order to do the same in their own lives. I also invite guests whose community work will equip listeners and viewers with the tools to impact change in their own community, as well. Please make sure to SUBSCRIBE TODAY by clicking ==. | | Trust me - You don't want to miss these inspirational and empowering conversations! Our Recent Episodes Include: Beto O'Rourke, Former U.S. Presidential Candidate & Congressman; Founder of Powered By People: | | == In Episode 05 of The Edwards Empowerment Talks podcast, Amanda Edwards has an honest conversation with Beto O'Rourke, former Candidate for U.S. President, former U.S. Congressman & Founder of Powered By People. His legendary 2018 run for U.S. Senate in Texas catapulted Beto onto the national stage. After coming close to winning his U.S. Senate bid, Beto set his sights on the White House, but concluded his bid for the Presidency earlier than he would have liked. Determined to have an impact on people and the community, Beto founded Powered By People, a grassroots PAC that supports Texas candidates with volunteer support and fundraising. Through his uniquely public journey, Beto is fueled by empowering others. Beto's desire to empower others and to contribute to the community we deserve has not come without obstacles. If you have ever had the desire to serve and faced losses and setbacks, this is one Episode you do not want to miss! You will get a little therapy, truth and motivation wrapped up in one in this Episode! | | == | | == Dr. Roger Mitchell, Chief Medical Examiner of Washington, D.C. & Deputy Mayor of Washington, D.C.: == | | In Episode 04 of The Edwards Empowerment Talks podcast, Amanda Edwards has a transparent and inspiring conversation with Dr. Roger Mitchell, the Washington, D.C. Chief Medical Examiner & Washington, D.C. Deputy Mayor of Public Safety & Justice. His journey to becoming the Chief Medical Examiner & Deputy Mayor of Washington, D.C. while balancing marriage and fatherhood was not an easy one. His father suffered from addiction during his upbringing, and his father's absence created a strong void in his life. However, through the power of faith, hard work, forgiveness and bold vision he was able to forge a path toward realizing his dreams. You will get therapy, church, school, comedy and encouragement wrapped up in one in this Episode! | | Exciting Upcoming Episodes Include: Bakari Sellers, Political Commentator, Author & Public Servant Lex Frieden, author of the Americans with Disabilities Act Lauren Anderson, first Black Principal Ballerina for Houston Ballet; One of the first Black Women to serve as a Principal Ballet Dancer in the United States Hon. Curtis Graves, Civil Rights Leader & Former Texas State House Representative | | | | | | ON THE ISSUES: COMPREHENSIVE CRIMINAL JUSTICE AND ECONOMIC POLICY REFORM IN 2021 In September, I highlighted through my Op-Ed in Essence that Vice President-Elect Kamala Harris would be well suited to help convene efforts to bring together stakeholders of a variety sorts (ranging from grassroots groups to corporations) to pursue a bold and comprehensive policy reform agenda for criminal justice reform and economic opportunity for America in 2021. To access this Op-Ed, please visit the click below: | | | | == How Kamala Harris As Vice President Can Lead An Agenda... Democratic Vice Presidential Candidate Senator Kamala Harris, recently addressed the horrific police brutality shooting of Jacob Blake in Kenosha, Wisconsin saying: "The reality is that the life of a Black person in America has never been treated ... == www.essence.com | | | | | UNTIL NEXT TIME Please stay tuned for the official launch of the Be The Solution: Community Empowerment Organization coming soon. | | == | | | Sincerely, Amanda K. Edwards | | | | For More Updates, Follow my Social Media by Clicking on the Links Here | == == == == | Paid for by Amanda Edwards | | Amanda Edwards | PO Box 66684, Houston, TX 77266 | | Sent by mailto:akedwards00@yahoo.com

name: Kevin Hern
subject: Honoring our nation’s veterans
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Hern For Congress
body:
Today, we recognize the courage & sacrifices of all those who’ve served.
Dear Peter, Today is Veterans Day 2020. It’s a special day of recognition when Americans stand united to honor the courage, heroism, and sacrifices made by our nation’s veterans. Every single day, men and women across our great nation leave their families and communities behind to ensure we continue to live in a freedom. Their sense of patriotism and duty is a driving force for them to put their lives on the line for ALL of us. I want to express my heartfelt gratitude to all those who’ve served. I hope you’ll join me. The U.S. Armed Forces are our front line in defense of liberty and our American way of life. They are the reason we live in a country that people around the world look to as a beacon of hope. So today we honor our veterans. Please join me in thanking the brave men and women who have served in uniform. Sincerely, Kevin id:2020-10-15-19:41:18:515t Paid For By Hern For Congress
---

9521-B Riverside Pkwy, #350, Tulsa, OK, 74137

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Holiday Season Canceled - Walz the Tyrant
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_targets_your_ho_202011&n=1)
---
Peter \-- 15 days til Thanksgiving. We're getting so close I can almost taste the turkey, gravy, stuffing...you get the picture. But thanks to Walz' illegal order yesterday, our Thanksgiving celebrations are basically canceled. **Walz is targeting YOUR home! His order yesterday prohibits you from inviting more than 10 people over to your home, even if its outdoors.** I don't know about you, but our Thanksgiving dinner always has more than 10 people. Our family enjoys getting together for that American holiday. Walz' order is so extreme that even if a family wants to brave the weather and host Thanksgiving in their backyard, our overlord Timmy does not approve that behavior for his subjects. Well, I for one do not obey Tyrants. Most of you don't know this, but I served our country for 12 years in the Army; two of those years overseas. My service was not so the American people could live under the rule of ONE PERSON! In fact the oath of office I took to the Constitution suggests the exact opposite. On this Veteran's Day, do you feel like we are LOSING our Republic?! **The Team at Action 4 Liberty is committed to Ending Walz' Emergency Powers because, like you, we also have a lot at stake. We have children in schools, business being impacted by the lockdown and we all value our liberty so much!** Democrats need to pay attention to what just happened last Tuesday. We needed to take out four bad voting Democrats and we accomplished it. In the case of politician Brad Tabke, we replaced him with a liberty champion named Erik Mortensen. We're coming out of this election with more power, more influence and more energy! So when the Legislature meets on Thursday to decide if they will end Walz' Emergency Powers again, we will be right back there defending YOUR liberty and Minnesota businesses. Walz' Assault on YOUR home and YOUR Thanksgiving plans can be killed on **Thursday by the Legislature**. Let's not wait until the new legislators take office in January, let's kick in the door and demand a "YES" vote now on Ending Walz' Emergency Powers! **The best way to help in this fight is to donate to our marketing budget. We must get the message out to more Minnesotans who are feeling the pain from the new lockdown. Help us harness their frustration and guide it to the right targets in St Paul.** | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_targets_your_ho_202011&n=2 "DONATE") [DONATE](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_targets_your_ho_202011&n=3)
---
If we want to be successful in Ending Walz' Emergency Powers, and I think we can be, we MUST build our movement even larger. Walz' new lockdown will hurt hundreds of thousands of new Minnesotans directly. We MUST find them and guide them where to funnel that frustration.
**You've been there for us when we asked you to contact legislators. And that work led to five Democrats joining us (think how hard that was to accomplish!).**
Help us get our message to more Minnesotans so our voice grows. NOW is the time to grow. The pain is real! Hundreds of thousands of Minnesotans NEED to hear our message of liberty NOW. Please help us get our voice to them.
## [Yes, I want to Grow Our Voice!](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_targets_your_ho_202011&n=4)
Thank you in advance for your contribution.
**In Liberty,

**
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
**P.S.****[Please help us expand our voice. Pitch in $100 if you can. If that's too much, help us out with $50 or $25. Or for max pain, donate $1,000.](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_targets_your_ho_202011&n=5)**
Action 4 Liberty · United States

clean_body: | Peter \-- 15 days til Thanksgiving. We're getting so close I can almost taste the turkey, gravy, stuffing...you get the picture. But thanks to Walz' illegal order yesterday, our Thanksgiving celebrations are basically canceled. Walz is targeting YOUR home! His order yesterday prohibits you from inviting more than 10 people over to your home, even if its outdoors. I don't know about you, but our Thanksgiving dinner always has more than 10 people. Our family enjoys getting together for that American holiday. Walz' order is so extreme that even if a family wants to brave the weather and host Thanksgiving in their backyard, our overlord Timmy does not approve that behavior for his subjects. Well, I for one do not obey Tyrants. Most of you don't know this, but I served our country for 12 years in the Army; two of those years overseas. My service was not so the American people could live under the rule of ONE PERSON! In fact the oath of office I took to the Constitution suggests the exact opposite. On this Veteran's Day, do you feel like we are LOSING our Republic?! The Team at Action 4 Liberty is committed to Ending Walz' Emergency Powers because, like you, we also have a lot at stake. name: Dean Browning
subject: Are You Kidding Me?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CSSPAC
body:
The FAKE NEWS MEDIA is at it again!
---
| | | | | |
---
| Dear Patriot,
Have you seen the Radical Left's most recent attempt to smear my name?
The Fake News Media has taken what I said COMPLETELY OUT OF CONTEXT; not even mentioning the fact that it was a direct quote from one of my supporters!!
I know why this is happening.
They are afraid. They are afraid of American Patriots like you and me.
CSSPAC is gaining SERIOUS momentum with new supporters joining us every single day.
But, our PAC is built off supporters like yourself. We need you to contribute TODAY so we can continue this momentum!
Would you consider donating $100, $50, or even just $25 today so we can fight back against the Radical Left?

| CSSPAC is a leader in Pennsylvania for Conservative Values and is working hard to support President Trump's efforts to prove the MASSIVE voter fraud here in our state.
We need a recount of the votes cast in Philadelphia WITH signature verification to determine who voted legally!!
We remain confident that once every legal vote is counted and the fraudulent votes have been thrown out, Donald J. Trump will win Pennsylvania.
President Trump cannot embark on this endeavor alone.
Will you show your support in President Donald J. Trump's re-election efforts by donating $100, $50, or even just $25?

For Freedom,
---
|
---
| Dean Browning Chairman Common Sense Solutions, PAC

name: Jason Yates, My Faith Votes
subject: Ronald Reagan’s Veterans Day Words are for Today
body:
| | Peter, It is fitting that when our nation is divided, and political uncertainty looms, we pause and remember the sacrifices that gave us freedom and made America who she is today. More than seven percent of the United States population are veterans; more than 18 million live with us today. While a duty to our country is something most Americans only consider on election day, our veterans answered the call to serve our nation with their life's work. On Veterans Day, November 11, 1988, President Ronald Reagan gave a speech at the Vietnam Veterans Memorial, and many of his words speak directly to this specific moment we find ourselves in today. Reagan said in part, _“We're gathered today, just as we have gathered before, to remember those who served, those who fought, those still missing, and those who gave their last full measure of devotion for our country. We're gathered at a monument on which the names of our fallen friends and loved ones are engraved, and with crosses instead of diamonds beside them, the names of those whose fate we do not yet know. One of those who fell wrote, shortly before his death, these words: ‘Take what they have left and what they have taught you with their dying and keep it with your own. And take one moment to embrace those gentle heroes you left behind.’”_ Reagan continued, “ _We remember those who were called upon to give all a person can give, and we remember those who were prepared to make that sacrifice if it were demanded of them in the line of duty, though it never was. Most of all, we remember the devotion and gallantry with which all of them ennobled their nation as they became champions of a noble cause.”_ **And, it is these next words Reagan shared that we must remember today.** _“Our liberties, our values, all for which America stands is safe today because brave men and women have been ready to face the fire at freedom's front. And we thank God for them._ _“Yes, gentle heroes and living love and our memories of a time when we faced great divisions here at home. And yet if this place recalls all this, both sweet and sad, it also reminds us of a great and profound truth about our nation: that from all our divisions we have always eventually emerged strengthened.”_ **Today, it is our prayer that you would take hold of two important messages:**
1. The freedoms we enjoy today are because veterans and men and women have sacrificed all they had to keep America safe and free. We owe them a debt of gratitude. Take some time to thank a veteran for answering the call to serve and defend our nation.
2. America has many wars and divisions in our history, but every time we have emerged a nation stronger on the other side. This history should give us hope, once again, for today.

Pray for our veterans today. Thank them for their service. And, continue to pray faithfully for our nation. **United. We Stand.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201111com01&n=1)

name: Nancy Mace
subject: re: Thank You to our Heroes 🇺🇸
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Mace for Congress
body:
Millions of our fellow citizens are reflecting on the service and sacrifice of
those who chose to put on the uniform to serve our country in the Armed
<>
Friend,

Today is a special and sacred day for Americans across the country.

Millions of our fellow citizens are reflecting on the service and sacrifice of
those who chose to put on the uniform of our Armed Forces in the name of
defending our freedoms.

Veterans Day is personal to me, friend.

As the first female graduate of The Citadel, the military culture of service,
sacrifice, and love of country is deeply ingrained in who I am. My family and
many of my former classmates are currently putting their lives on the line in
service to our country.

Military service is something of a family tradition for me — my dad is the
most decorated living graduate of The Citadel, and he literally wrote the
Ranger Field Manual for the U.S. Army (I’m not kidding), and most of my family
members are currently active-duty members of our Armed Forces or are veterans.

Their sacrifice inspires me to continue to find ways to serve our country and
to make sure that our government takes care of our veterans and their families
after they leave active duty. Their service is always something that is always
in the front of my mind, and it drives me to never give up in my fight to get
our veterans the support they need and deserve.

Before you go, I’d like to ask you to join me in taking a moment today to
thank those in your life who put everything on the line for us to remain free.

God bless America, and God bless those who chose to serve our country.

Thank you for reading,

Nancy Mace

Paid for by Nancy Mace for Congress

295 Seven Farms Drive C-186 Charleston, SC 29492

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com

name: Eric Holcomb
subject: a quick word about Veterans Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
All across the country today, people are joining together to honor our veterans — those who sacrificed everything in order to serve our country... | |
---
| |
---|---|---
|
---
Friend,

_All across the country today, people are joining together to honor our veterans — those who sacrificed everything in order to serve our country and defend the freedom that we hold dear. _

On Veterans Day, I always reflect on why I chose to serve, and why millions of other Americans since the inception of our country have chosen to put on the uniform of our Armed Forces.

Just last week, while watching our lively democracy in action, I was reminded of why so many people have signed up to serve in our armed forces — why generations of Americans have put their lives on the line repeatedly and without hesitation.

Our democracy is precious, and the ability to freely exercise our right to vote is one of the most fundamental aspects of our republic.

I’d like to ask a favor before you click out of this email. I’d like to invite you to reach out to someone in your life who has served — a family member, a neighbor, a friend — and thank them for their service.

We owe them a debt we can never repay.

Thank you for reading,

Eric Holcomb
---
---
|
|
| |

name: Darin LaHood
subject: Thank you for your service, veterans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by LaHood for Congress |
body:
Today is a valuable opportunity to honor the millions of men and women around us who sacrificed to defend America | |
---
|
---
Friend,

**We could never thank our veterans enough for their service – but today, I encourage each and every one of us to try.**

Today is much more than just an extra day off from school or work.

It’s a valuable opportunity for us to honor the millions of men and women around us who have made incredible sacrifices to defend America.

Their commitment to our nation goes far beyond what any of us could ever imagine – and unfortunately, it also goes unrecognized far too often.

_Our nation’s security, strength, and freedoms wouldn’t be possible without the men and women in uniform who wake up and defend them every day._

**We can never afford to forget that, and more importantly, we can never afford to allow future generations to forget that.**

To all those who have served or are currently serving, thank you for your service to our nation. I can’t say that enough.

Thank you,
Darin LaHood

---
| |
---

name: Caitlin O'Dea (Team Kelly)
subject: PHOTO RELEASE: SENATOR RUBIO HEADLINES "SAVE OUR MAJORITY" RALLY FOR SENATORS LOEFFLER, PERDUE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE WEDNESDAY, NOVEMBER 11, 2020
PHOTO RELEASE: SENATOR RUBIO HEADLINES "SAVE OUR MAJORITY" RALLY FOR SENATORS LOEFFLER, PERDUE
ATLANTA - This morning, Senator Marco Rubio (R-FL) joined Senator Kelly Loeffler and Mrs. Bonnie Perdue - wife of Senator David Perdue - for a massive "Save Our Majority" Rally at the Cobb County GOP Headquarters in Marietta. The event, the first of its kind since the Senators' big win on Election Day, drew hundreds of Georgians - sending a strong message to the Radical Left that Georgia will hold the line and defend the Republican Majority in the United States Senate.
View photos from the event below:

|

| ### Caitlin O'Dea Press Secretary 770-876-1696 caitlin@kellyforsenate.com

name: Mark Warner
subject: About Georgia.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
There's still work to be done -- and we can still win control of the Senate.
|
---

| | Hi Derek --

I'm reaching back out to you because we have an incredible chance to have a Democratic majority in the Senate.

You may know that **_both_** Senate races in Georgia are runoffs this year. That means we have one more chance to send Democrats Jon Ossoff and Rev. Raphael Warnock to the Senate and flip the Senate blue.

Let's be clear about one thing: the path to a blue Senate runs right through Georgia. We have momentum on our side, and we have two great candidates who are committed to reversing the damage of the Trump administration, protecting our health care, and building an economy that works for everyone.

Here's the bad news: the GOP is funneling millions of dollars into Georgia to make sure that Republicans keep control of the Senate. If we allow the GOP to maintain control of the Senate, they will continue their pattern of dismantling progress we've made to ensure a fairer and more equal country for all Americans. And they'll continue putting bills that Democrats are bringing to the floor to move our country forward into a legislative graveyard.

I don't know about you, but I'm ready to move forward, and I believe we have the momentum right now to make a major change. **This isn 't over -- we can still turn the Senate blue.**

**[So please, if you have the means, pitch in to help us turn the tide in Georgia and regain the majority in the Senate by electing Jon Ossoff and Rev. Raphael Warnock.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d9dd/53d9897e/550df9f5/1c88ce07/3238272687/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijk0MiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-ga?refcode=20201110_f_1_nd__942__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**

With your help, we can flip the Senate blue and give President-elect Joe Biden and Vice President-elect Kamala Harris the support they need to make real and necessary change in our country. We have work to do. **[Please consider pitching in to help.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d9dd/53d9897e/550df9f5/1c88ce06/3238272687/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijk0MiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-ga?refcode=20201110_f_1_nd__942__&refcode2=ask2&amount=5")**

Thank you for your support! We can win this. |
---
-- Mark Warner

body:
Today, as we have for almost 100 years now, celebrate Veterans Day. On this day, we take a second and reflect on the great sacrifices that the brave men and women of our armed forces make every single day to keep us safe.
Friend,

Today, as we have for almost 100 years now, celebrate Veterans Day. On this day, we take a second and reflect on the great sacrifices that the brave men and women of our armed forces make every single day to keep us safe.

As a graduate of the United States Naval Academy and Marine, Todd Young took his call to action from the Corps to Congress, continuing his oath to preserve and protect our Constitution. Today, we ask you to take a few moments to sign our card, thanking Todd for his service, as we encourage you to thank a veteran every day.

[**WISH TODD A HAPPY VETERANS DAY**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Jth7TBLrOQ-vYVPzrKwwNSA9nZgR8U1y3a99pzl98jMpxdUSjQUGptpCqNIalxCI-aYN6zE4cCpCTsmpzTX432eFti_M6NAK0cKQVC0rbz5M60upA0uArrghT18HdT1ILt-SHOY5bkMj7T8iXpzOPnON02I4VwdpT29adwZqztbLbhn4ncl1toIq38jcP8U07EXoYOVYqOirjPsULul30lkgAwIvPVBpGG9fFu1c015N4AwJp48twbF5tyqxlxAcwlNAMcktkWus_sZa7spGIFPQamz_ne1UOv1-MeehRdXlIUWjJ--mXcucEasQ9byz1LJE1Q68Y-xB_99EpFaoyO__UQHMVyztTUkETEzxLS6xeX_pUbAsRi8zr6rJQ1bFc_R3q3L8g5ngViVzWm6K662KgSxy1XbjmcMudvwgAryRIs4r7w784Q==&c=Oky6pWkKeUem-qM4VOyd5av1AlFhx18S-lRuvR5w5OqXWbOSbSWi7g==&ch=YYq7ssuWETyHKCKPbRevNcGhq_bQAq1uujAiqroogWqnHRdWUiX95Q==)
---

Our nation is made stronger every day by the sacrifice of those who serve. We must never forget their valiant efforts to ensure peace and prosperity for our nation and allies abroad.

Please take a few seconds to sign our card; we know Todd will greatly appreciate seeing your name!

[**WISH TODD A HAPPY VETERANS DAY**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Jth7TBLrOQ-vYVPzrKwwNSA9nZgR8U1y3a99pzl98jMpxdUSjQUGptpCqNIalxCI-aYN6zE4cCpCTsmpzTX432eFti_M6NAK0cKQVC0rbz5M60upA0uArrghT18HdT1ILt-SHOY5bkMj7T8iXpzOPnON02I4VwdpT29adwZqztbLbhn4ncl1toIq38jcP8U07EXoYOVYqOirjPsULul30lkgAwIvPVBpGG9fFu1c015N4AwJp48twbF5tyqxlxAcwlNAMcktkWus_sZa7spGIFPQamz_ne1UOv1-MeehRdXlIUWjJ--mXcucEasQ9byz1LJE1Q68Y-xB_99EpFaoyO__UQHMVyztTUkETEzxLS6xeX_pUbAsRi8zr6rJQ1bFc_R3q3L8g5ngViVzWm6K662KgSxy1XbjmcMudvwgAryRIs4r7w784Q==&c=Oky6pWkKeUem-qM4VOyd5av1AlFhx18S-lRuvR5w5OqXWbOSbSWi7g==&ch=YYq7ssuWETyHKCKPbRevNcGhq_bQAq1uujAiqroogWqnHRdWUiX95Q==)

body:
**Georgia Senate candidate Warnock was youth pastor of church that hosted, praised Fidel Castro in 1995
-Fox News **

**And it 's why I'm in Georgia _RIGHT NOW_ to help my Senate colleagues in their fight against the radical Left.**
Liberal candidate, Raphael Warnock, is running against Kelly Loeffler in Georgia's tight Senate race.
_**Warnock worked at a church that celebrated and praised Fidel Castro in 1995, encouraging the attendees to join him by chanting, "Fidel! Fidel! Fidel!"**_

subject: Chuck Schumer’s plan to change the world

body:
Friend,

Did you hear what Chuck Schumer said about the Georgia Runoff elections?

Schumer and his allies are not even trying to hide their radical plans anymore. If they FLIP both Senate seats in Georgia, then they are going to change the world.
[Stop Schumer's Takeover](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/chuck-schumer-wants-to-change-the-world/?utm_campaign=20201111_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1040425-1260&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20201111_chuck-schumers-plan-to-change-the-world)
---

Here is their plan:

* Enact the job-killing Green New Deal which will eliminate fossil fuels and fracking
* Eliminate private insurance and force all Americans onto a government run plan
* Repeal Opportunity Zones ending crucial investments in our impoverished communities
* Confirm liberal judges to the bench that will ignore the Constitution
* Pass gun control which will take away your right to protect yourself and your family

Friend, I could keep going, but I think you get the idea.

**[You have the power to stop Chuck Schumer by chipping in $10, $25, $50 or whatever you can afford.

](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/chuck-schumer-wants-to-change-the-world/?utm_campaign=20201111_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1040425-1260&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20201111_chuck-schumers-plan-to-change-the-world)**

Tim Scott

That's too close for comfort. After tonight's update, this race could get even tighter. == Here 's where things stand: 8 days after Election Day, we are only a few thousand votes ahead of our opponent, and there are still thousands of votes left to tally. That's too close for comfort. After tonight's update, this race could get even tighter. Young can still win this, but she needs you to fight to ensure that every vote is counted. Can you chip in $5, $10, or even $25 to our Recount Fund right now? | == == == == == We knew this race would be close, Young's been saying that for nearly two years. But it's a fight worth fighting until the very end. Young's self-funded millionaire opponent has deep pockets prepared to fund Pelosi's lawyer army -- we need to be prepared to fight back. == If every person who read this email chipped in $4 we'd be able to replenish our war chest and then some. -- California Republican Alerts For the 2020 Federal election cycle, a candidate committee may raise up to $2,800 from an individual, up to $5,000 from a Federal multicandidate PAC, and up to $2,800 from a Federal non-multicandidate PAC. name: Marco Rubio
subject: Why I'm in Georgia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
Friend, the entire world has their eyes on Georgia and for good reason.

The future of our entire country hangs in the balance as we fight for Georgia and the Senate Majority.

It's for this very reason that I am here in Georgia. I'm here to show my support for **Kelly Loeffler** and **David Perdue** and join their fight _IN PERSON_ as they battle against the non stop attacks from the radical left.

The Senate races in Georgia are extra important to me, Friend, not only because our Senate Majority hangs in the balance, but also because of the candidates that my colleagues are fighting against.

_**Raphael Warnock worked with a church that welcomed, sheltered and even PRAISED Fidel Castro during a visit to the US in 1995. **_

That should scare EVERYONE. We've seen the radical Left try to masquerade their socialist ties before and this no different.
[_**SUPPORT GEORGIA CONSERVATIVES >>>**_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VNvpEWANmPK9DegKqvsWoNv2Q6i5edJINbLUyTRlhhZIjXEq3tTOzp3sIYNji-1593DG50McnFbqlMQC6JLApiKwqHX4beVVpMH5tTHjQTJey3Y6RPn-TbayCbpXYB15EXyFaDo0XvxZ66dXUC9EVbqvFxhP9QYpdHCZ9u5gsjxMAJXZiyZpYnHK_Ji0X980vpy-AtNqYsNGfgmtVOQXMrut5_BDW3jcno7lTcLgfvX20DOniR8oU9AkbcwZkxkKfQ34IqtpeENBeyvNeb1py3Jfk8qd7vvXbITOH5tEzqBbtWfluG_0nLmIVbBctyO1r93_Qq1Bl2ordykBZKO8AypewlN0RGR0wD5o6m2IajyLaxXN_QRe0IZvFld-uPiYXKtoQC3Y69jA8rUXpbmyo2SL0aEgLm0a0wUAOxQ9SuD7NhP1kqGRbA9HOifvYj1a&c=49hLK76biWaOaDjJFhy_9NDatNIehVvBaSn2wtAAD3qWf3UOYAtrZA==&ch=1pKgevtBSi2AH4O5j4A7j5G5h3yXHLJKD_KSkd7ythnr9LsmfGGWNw==)
The radical Left wants to disguise themselves from the American people until they're in office and then flip their socialist switch on our country. We can't allow this to happen. [_**Will you donate $100, $75, $25 or even $5 right now to support conservatives and keep socialism OUT of our Senate and OUT of Georgia?**_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VNvpEWANmPK9DegKqvsWoNv2Q6i5edJINbLUyTRlhhZIjXEq3tTOzp3sIYNji-1593DG50McnFbqlMQC6JLApiKwqHX4beVVpMH5tTHjQTJey3Y6RPn-TbayCbpXYB15EXyFaDo0XvxZ66dXUC9EVbqvFxhP9QYpdHCZ9u5gsjxMAJXZiyZpYnHK_Ji0X980vpy-AtNqYsNGfgmtVOQXMrut5_BDW3jcno7lTcLgfvX20DOniR8oU9AkbcwZkxkKfQ34IqtpeENBeyvNeb1py3Jfk8qd7vvXbITOH5tEzqBbtWfluG_0nLmIVbBctyO1r93_Qq1Bl2ordykBZKO8AypewlN0RGR0wD5o6m2IajyLaxXN_QRe0IZvFld-uPiYXKtoQC3Y69jA8rUXpbmyo2SL0aEgLm0a0wUAOxQ9SuD7NhP1kqGRbA9HOifvYj1a&c=49hLK76biWaOaDjJFhy_9NDatNIehVvBaSn2wtAAD3qWf3UOYAtrZA==&ch=1pKgevtBSi2AH4O5j4A7j5G5h3yXHLJKD_KSkd7ythnr9LsmfGGWNw==)

Everything we have worked for comes down to Georgia, Friend and we can't stop short.

The work we put in now will have an impact on our nation for decades to come. Our country is at a crossroads between continued liberty and the path to socialism. I'm fighting to ensure America does not fall victim to the socialism that has ruined so many countries before. I hope i can count on your support in this endeavor.
[_**SUPPORT GEORGIA CONSERVATIVES >>>**_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VNvpEWANmPK9DegKqvsWoNv2Q6i5edJINbLUyTRlhhZIjXEq3tTOzp3sIYNji-1593DG50McnFbqlMQC6JLApiKwqHX4beVVpMH5tTHjQTJey3Y6RPn-TbayCbpXYB15EXyFaDo0XvxZ66dXUC9EVbqvFxhP9QYpdHCZ9u5gsjxMAJXZiyZpYnHK_Ji0X980vpy-AtNqYsNGfgmtVOQXMrut5_BDW3jcno7lTcLgfvX20DOniR8oU9AkbcwZkxkKfQ34IqtpeENBeyvNeb1py3Jfk8qd7vvXbITOH5tEzqBbtWfluG_0nLmIVbBctyO1r93_Qq1Bl2ordykBZKO8AypewlN0RGR0wD5o6m2IajyLaxXN_QRe0IZvFld-uPiYXKtoQC3Y69jA8rUXpbmyo2SL0aEgLm0a0wUAOxQ9SuD7NhP1kqGRbA9HOifvYj1a&c=49hLK76biWaOaDjJFhy_9NDatNIehVvBaSn2wtAAD3qWf3UOYAtrZA==&ch=1pKgevtBSi2AH4O5j4A7j5G5h3yXHLJKD_KSkd7ythnr9LsmfGGWNw==)

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Stop Walz - Contact Your Legislator
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=contact_your_legisla&n=1)
---
Peter \-- BIG SHOWDOWN ON THURSDAY! Tyrant-in-the-Making Walz just extended his Emergency Powers, locked us down and now has to call the Legislature back to the Capitol. **Four Democrats will be showing up tomorrow licking their wounds from their election defeat thanks to YOUR support!** I can't wait until their replacements take office in January, but quite frankly, Minnesota businesses and citizens can't wait that long. **[It's important that you double down on what you did at the ballot box by dialing up your representative and drive home the point: Minnesota demands to End Walz' Emergency Powers NOW!](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=fC4tS59abWPkKoho6fpdBaxgivC3ew34aXVRl71bKPt4AMqEKN1kSHye-godlxfhwGIWzpsVRReAphhLpB68VKTd2q7FMEmG1ukI783rliX1MX7b47ATmsFZXnrc8gilaiE3fpar1mJb1p8rXQR9sK8w-MWQMxJ5QniMvn1ij8QwXk6IwrBOJfg-nMyR_ywEWstBm2pIzwMq2j8MD6ORRwNJrjo-oc3pWXAPWN0Pi6v-nQz7QLZ440_noqfzL9232dJMm-jY71H_yARunNumLgRHcgIQRFeE2pw21R7Z_mMRBYrnjaBKLZc9iEtP05O6&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=contact_your_legisla&n=2)** Brad Tabke, John Persell, Jeanne Poppe & Jeff Brand got booted by voters last week for being on the wrong side of Walz' Emergency Powers. All of their peers in the Democrat caucus from vulnerable districts just saw what happens when you stand against us. Democrat legislators like Julie Sanstede is on thin ice right now in her recount. She's currently only 41 votes ahead of Rob Farnsworth.

Rep. Sanstede is barely clinging to her seat because she saw the political tsunami coming and voted to end Walz's Emergency Powers - along with three other DFLers who won re-election. We must make sure she and the other politicians in St Paul know the voters are watching even though the election is over. We will take this to the 2022 election if we have to. [**That’s why it’s vital Minnesota politicians Hold the Line and vote to End Walz' Emergency Powers. Please call your representative today**](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=fC4tS59abWPkKoho6fpdBaxgivC3ew34aXVRl71bKPt4AMqEKN1kSHye-godlxfhwGIWzpsVRReAphhLpB68VKTd2q7FMEmG1ukI783rliX1MX7b47ATmsFZXnrc8gilaiE3fpar1mJb1p8rXQR9sK8w-MWQMxJ5QniMvn1ij8QwXk6IwrBOJfg-nMyR_ywEWstBm2pIzwMq2j8MD6ORRwNJrjo-oc3pWXAPWN0Pi6v-nQz7QLZ440_noqfzL9232dJMm-jY71H_yARunNumLgRHcgIQRFeE2pw21R7Z_mOF77XOQJMs0fjxxPbMwob1&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=contact_your_legisla&n=3). If your legislator says they’re leaning in our favor, demand that they hold the line and refuse to back down on this crucial issue. We MUST save our Republic from these Tyrants. Help us in this battle by making the calls. **In Liberty,

** **Jake Duesenberg** **President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=contact_your_legisla&n=4).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=contact_your_legisla&n=5).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=contact_your_legisla&n=6), software for leaders.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Chairman=20Kyle=20Hupfer?=
subject: Hoosier Help needed to maintain the GOP Senate Majority
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
Control of the United States Senate hangs in the balance and you can help preserve our Republican majority in the upper chamber.. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/together-we-made-history-469974?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
| Hoosier Republican,

We won big this year... but our work is not yet over. In fact, control of the United States Senate hangs in the balance and you can help preserve our Republican majority in the upper chamber.

It all comes down to Georgia where BOTH Republican-held US Senate Seats are heading to a runoff in January and Indiana’s Senior Senator, Todd Young, is leading the charge to keep Senators David Perdue and Kelly Loeffler in the Senate.

Senator Young has turned on the “bat signal,” calling all able Hoosier Republicans to volunteer in the Peach State to lock up victories. This is something Hoosier Republicans know a lot about! The fact is, election 2020 isn’t over. President Trump is fighting to ensure every legally cast ballot is counted, and we support his efforts. In Indiana, we delivered huge wins for President Donald Trump, Vice President Mike Pence, Governor Eric Holcomb, Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch, Rep-elect Victoria Spartz, and Attorney General-elect Todd Rokita. We expanded our supermajority in the House and held out supermajority in the Senate.

We won the home game, easily. Now we need a road win.

Because if Democrats get control of the Senate, with Nancy Pelosi already caving to the demands of the socialist Squad in the House, a radical, leftwing agenda the likes of which we’ve never seen. Packing the Supreme Court, abolishing the Electoral College, The Green New Deal, statehood for Washington DC, defunding the police, and all the other leftwing wish list items will be one step closer to happening.

This is where you come in. Can you volunteer a weekend or two for Senators David Perdue and Kelly Loeffler between now and the runoff on January 5?

Hoosiers willing to deploy to Georgia and volunteer by making calls and knocking on doors to save our country should fill out the below link:
[https://docs.google.com/forms/d/1KNI53qbU7z18ox0CD9siXfckxNdrbWoA_lyHQs-0l0U/viewform?edit_requested=true](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d3ec47bbee&e=1acd9bb3d6)

Expenses such as flights, hotel, and meals will be covered for trips a weekend or longer. The runoff is January 5th, so you can go anytime from now until then.

Let’s show Georgia how we do things in Indiana and get a win on the road!

Thank you,

Kyle Hupfer
Chairman
---

name: Team Stanton
subject: Thank You For Your Support!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress |
body:
Friend,

Because of your support we were victorious in Arizona's 9th District! I cannot thank you enough for your contributions to my campaign and for making your voice heard in this election. It means a lot to me to have you in my corner and I deeply appreciate all you have done to help my campaign.

We still have much work to do to defeat this deadly pandemic, revive our economy, and overcome our country's growing political divisiveness, but with your continued support, I know that we will be successful. I'm looking forward to rolling up my sleeves and continuing our work on behalf of Arizonans.

Thank you again for all of your support throughout this campaign and beyond!

-- Team Stanton

------------------------------------------

Stanton for Congress
4340 E Indian School Rd.

Phoenix AZ 85018 United States

name: Dick Durbin
subject: Georgia on our minds
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
Peter,
We have Georgia on our minds.
**[Can we take Stacey Abrams' winning formula and make magic again in the two Senate runoffs on January 5? Pitch in $5 to support Raphael Warnock and Jon Ossoff now.](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-201107-georgia-runoff?refcode=em201110i_1103&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Need motivation? Well, these two Senate seats in Georgia mean:
President Biden has a Senate working with him not against him to restore our great nation **\-- AND I DON'T HAVE TO LIVE IN MITCH MCCONNELL's SENATE for two more years!!**
Save me.
Save America.
**[One more time...please. Make a $5 contribution to help Democrats win in Georgia.](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-201107-georgia-runoff?refcode=em201110i_1103&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
My best,
Dick Durbin

**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-201107-georgia-runoff?refcode=em201110i_1103&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

* * *
Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
